name: DuoWealth
targetAudience: Couples and newlyweds merging finances who need real-time visibility across joint and individual accounts

steps.step: Creating new repo from template: CorySlsbry/Contractor-CFO-Dashboard → duowealth...

brand.tagline: The budgeting app built for two.

pain_points.problem: Arguing over who paid for what and settling up at the end of the month
pain_points.current_solution: Using complex shared Excel spreadsheets or sending endless Venmo requests.

brand.win_strategy: Partner with wedding planners and personal finance influencers on Instagram/TikTok targeting engaged couples.
brand.hook_headline: Stop fighting over money. Manage your joint budget seamlessly in 5 minutes a week.

review_themes.our_fix: Utilize Finicity + MX as fallbacks for Plaid to ensure 99% uptime on bank connections.
review_themes.sample_quote: Every 3 days I have to re-authenticate my bank. Plaid integration is completely broken.

review_themes.our_fix: Granular privacy controls allowing partners to share specific accounts/cards while keeping individual accounts private but factored into net worth.
review_themes.sample_quote: It lumps everything together. I want to see our joint expenses, but keep my personal checking private.

brand.risk_reversal: 30-day free trial, no credit card required to connect your bank.
brand.app_description: The budgeting app built for two.
brand.target_audience: Couples and newlyweds merging finances who need real-time visibility across joint and individual accounts

top_competitors.name: Honeydue
top_competitors.weakness: Constant bank disconnection issues and delayed transaction syncing

top_competitors.name: Goodbudget
top_competitors.weakness: Manual entry only on the free tier, no automated bank sync

brand.key_differentiator: Flawless bank syncing using multiple data aggregators, solving the #1 reason couples abandon finance apps.
our_10x_advantages: Multi-aggregator bank sync (Plaid + MX + Finicity) for zero dropped connections
Built-in 'Settle Up' feature to instantly square away split bills
Automated categorization AI trained specifically on household expenses
In-app chat on specific transactions (e.g., 'What was this Amazon charge?')
brand.target_business_count: ~10 million Google Play Store users in this category
